David Guetta and Black Coffee in conversation 🤝

The two dance music powerhouses come together for a wide-ranging and candid chat in the latest episode of DJ Mag Originals series, The Green Room. They discuss their Ibiza legacies, residencies at Hï Ibiza, the recently opened [UNVRS], and Ushuaïa, thoughts on success, collaboration, and more.

Watch the full episode on DJ Mag’s YouTube channel ⏯️

OUT NOW ‘Awake Tonight’ @siamusic , @davidguetta and I have always been connected through different genres, but coming back to dance music together for the first time since Titanium feels like home. We’re so excited to finally share this special record with you.
